relationName.description: Represents the relationship between the client and the store.

emissionDate.description: Gift card emission date. It must be in the format `YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.fff` (ISO 8601 format).

expiringDate.description: Gift card expiration date. It must be in the format `YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.fff` (ISO 8601 format).

caption.description: Field to be filled in if a loyalty program must be created for the gift card.

restrictedToOwner.description: The gift card can only be used for a specified client's ID.

multipleRedemptions.description: The gift card can be used to make new purchases until its value is completely used.

multipleCredits.description: The gift card balance can be changed.

profileId.description: Client ID. You can use the customer's registered email or the `userId` parameter which can be found in the [Master Data](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/master-data--4otjBnR27u4WUIciQsmkAw).
